title: Project Report: Manual Test Suite for Web App — QA & Test Engineer
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
project_title: Manual Test Suite for Web App
summary: Write 30 test cases, execute exploratory sessions, log bugs in a tracking template.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Beginner)*

**Manual Test Suite for Web App** is a beginner-level end-to-end project for QA & Test Engineer. Duration: 1–2 weeks. Write 30 test cases, execute exploratory sessions, log bugs in a tracking template. Tools: Excel/Sheets, Bug tracker template.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: 30 structured test cases
Objective: 5 exploratory charters
Objective: 10 bug reports with severity
Objective: Test summary report
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
QA & Test Engineer portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a QA & Test Engineer resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a QA & Test Engineer resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Beginner)*

Submit all final deliverables: Test plan; 30 test cases; 10 bug reports; Summary report. Skills demonstrated: Manual testing, Documentation. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: Test plan
Deliverable: 30 test cases
Deliverable: 10 bug reports
Deliverable: Summary report
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits Test plan and passes the rubric.
